title: Masakia lutchuensis
taxonomy: Masakia lutchuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region, specifically in India. The plant is classified under the genus Masakia and is closely related to other species within the same family. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the broader botanical hierarchy. However, its classification under the family Rubiaceae indicates its affinity with other plants like coffee and gardenia.
